project_info.name: SafeConnect
project_info.description: Women-only solo travel safety and networking platform

design_principles: Premium feminine but modern UI with soft glassmorphism
White clean backgrounds with deep dark mode support
Floating bottom navbar and rounded corners

button.primary: Use expo-linear-gradient with gradient_primary. borderRadius: radii.full. Add shadow.md.
button.glass: Use expo-blur BlurView. backgroundColor: glass_bg. borderColor: glass_border. borderWidth: 1. borderRadius: radii.full.

navbar.floating_bottom: position: 'absolute', bottom: 24, left: 24, right: 24. Use BlurView with glass_bg. borderRadius: radii.full. flexDirection: 'row', justifyContent: 'space-between', padding: 16. shadow.md.

card.default: backgroundColor: surface. borderRadius: radii.lg. padding: spacing.lg. shadow.sm.
card.glass: Use BlurView. borderRadius: radii.lg. padding: spacing.lg. borderWidth: 1, borderColor: glass_border.

input.default: backgroundColor: surface, borderRadius: radii.md, padding: spacing.md, borderWidth: 1, borderColor: border. Font body.

animations.transition: Use React Native Animated or Reanimated for smooth transitions.
animations.press: Use TouchableOpacity with activeOpacity={0.7} or Pressable with scale animation.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `testID` attribute (React Native equivalent of data-testid). Use kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., testID='login-form-submit-button').

avatars.description: Profile picture of young woman, smiling

instructions_to_main_agent: Use ONLY Expo and React Native standard components (View, Text, StyleSheet, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, TextInput, Image).
Use expo-blur for glassmorphism effects (e.g., floating bottom navbar, glass cards).
Use expo-linear-gradient for the primary purple-to-pink gradients as requested.
Implement the floating bottom navbar using position 'absolute' and BlurView to give it a premium feel over the content.
Ensure dark mode support by using React Native's useColorScheme() hook or a context provider, flipping colors defined in this guideline.
Apply `testID` to all interactive components as per the testing rules.
No Tailwind CSS or className; strict StyleSheet usage only.
Use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs for image placeholders.
